RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mysql/crsp_read_dbtablename_cc_by_suffix.mysql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ delimiter //// create procedure $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$sp_read_dbtablename_cc_by_suffix$($implMySqlSPStandardArgs$$iterate Columns( each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ ) not deterministic reads sql data begin declare done boolean default false;$poptop Table switch SecScope None empty System empty Cluster implMySqlSPReadTableDeclPermFlag Tenant implMySqlSPReadTableDeclPermFlag default error$ declare continue handler for not found set done = true;$poptop Table switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecUser empty default implMySqlSPReadEnforceSec$$switch SecScope None implMySqlSPReadCCBySuffixSystem System implMySqlSPReadCCBySuffixSystem Cluster implMySqlSPReadCCBySuffixRestrictCluster Tenant implMySqlSPReadCCBySuffixRestrictTenant default error$ end;////
RuleSet.GenRule: select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $poptop Table lower ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMySqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $iterate Columns( first implMySqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMySqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc;

if( isSystemUser = true ) then select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $poptop Table lower ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMySqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $iterate Columns( first implMySqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMySqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc; else select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $poptop Table lower ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMySqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $iterate Columns( first implMySqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMySqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ and $poptop Table lower reference ClusterIdColumn reference Table ClassCode$.$poptop Table lower reference ClusterIdColumn DbColumnName$ = secClusterId order by ClassCode asc; end if;

if( isSystemUser = true ) then select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $poptop Table lower ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMySqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $iterate Columns( first implMySqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMySqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ order by ClassCode asc; else select distinct( $lower poptop Table reference BaseClass ClassCode$.ClassCode ) as ClassCode from $poptop Table lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $poptop Table lower ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implMySqlClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ where $iterate Columns( first implMySqlIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implMySqlIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$ and $poptop Table lower reference TenantIdColumn reference Table ClassCode$.$poptop Table lower reference TenantIdColumn DbColumnName$ = secTenantId order by ClassCode asc; end if;
